title: chamaecrista caribaea
intro: Chamaecrista caribaea, also known as Crab's Eye, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chamaecrista caribaea include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Chamaecrista caribaea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
